# Data Source: okta_auth_server_policies

Get a list of policies for an authorization server from Okta.

## Example Usage

{{tffile "/Users/rmcgregor/Development/terraform-provider-okta/examples/data-sources/okta_auth_server_policies/data-source.tf"}}

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auth_server_id` (String) Auth server ID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `policies` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies`

Read-Only:

- `assigned_clients` (Set of String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `priority` (Number)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
